data.title: 国际服半周年&200天纪念音乐会

data.body:
Congratulations for 0.5-Year Anniversary & 200 days with you, we are inviting Sensei to a special concert!

⏰Sound Archive Premiere: 2022/5/27 8:00 AM (UTC)

#BlueArchive
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=W5njQTpJMRs

Please check our official website for the concert program♬
